strengths: Dark background with amber/gold accent colour is consistently applied across all pages, creating strong brand cohesion
Split-left hero layout is correctly implemented with headline on left and image placeholder on right
Typography hierarchy is clear with bold oversized headline, supporting body copy, and visible CTA button
Services section uses numbered list format with clean spacing that aids readability
Navigation is clean, minimal, and consistently placed across all pages
The amber CTA buttons have good contrast against the dark background and are visually prominent
About page philosophy quote callout box adds visual interest and reinforces trust messaging
Footer is well-structured with three-column layout covering branding, navigation, and contact

issues.issue: Hero image placeholder is still showing 'Replace with hero image' text — no actual photography of electricians or real work is present, severely undermining trust and realism
issues.fix: Replace placeholder with a high-quality photo of a licensed electrician working in a Melbourne home, ideally showing a clean professional environment

issues.issue: Services page appears largely empty with excessive dark void above the first service card, suggesting content or images are missing or not rendering
issues.fix: Add a hero heading section at the top of the services page and ensure all four service cards are visible and populated with imagery or icons

issues.issue: No trust signals are present anywhere on the site — no reviews, star ratings, licence numbers, years in business, or any social proof that would convert hesitant homeowners
issues.fix: Add a testimonials section on the homepage with 3 Google-style reviews, and display licence number and years of experience near the hero CTA

issues.issue: The homepage CTA section 'Ready to get started?' is very minimal with just a headline and button — no supporting reassurance copy or contact details visible
issues.fix: Add a phone number prominently, a short reassurance line like 'Licensed, insured, and available 24/7', and consider a secondary micro-CTA in the hero

issues.issue: About page principles section cuts off after '01 Straight Talk' — additional principles are not visible, making the page feel incomplete
issues.fix: Ensure all value/principle items are rendered and visible, with consistent spacing between numbered items

issues.issue: The dark background is very close to pure black (#000) with minimal texture or depth, making some sections feel flat and undifferentiated
issues.fix: Introduce subtle section differentiation using a very dark charcoal (#111 or #141414) for alternating sections to create visual rhythm without breaking the dark theme

verdict: A solid, intentionally designed dark-theme electrical trade site with strong brand consistency and correct layout implementation, but critically undermined by a missing hero image and incomplete services page that must be resolved before launch to achieve its lead generation goal.
